failures.description: The Executor misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch results and selected item 2243454707 at $164.46 as the cheapest, even though the tool output showed item 1240311797 at $137.17 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The plan and tool call were correct: ProductCatalogSearch returned available Electric Kettle items sorted by ascending price. The relevant tool output showed item 1240311797 at $137.17 as the first and cheapest result, while item 2243454707 at $164.46 was the last and most expensive listed result. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer using the wrong item from the tool output, contradicting the returned evidence. This is not an invalid tool call, underspecification, or unsupported intent; it is a reasoning error over tool output.
